results.title: Superman’s Euphoria Cameo Gets Clarification From James Gunn
results.description: DC Studios co-chair James Gunn has responded to a Superman cameo in HBO’s Euphoria. The moment happened in Season 3 Episode 7 of the ongoing series. Euphoria, which streams on HBO Max under the Warner Bros.
